enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Ngons will not be created, nor will they be exported if they already exist

enum_values.name: Preserve
enum_values.summary: If ngons already exist, they will be used as is, no ngons will be created

enum_values.name: Create
enum_values.summary: Ngons will be created, if possible, by calling Mesh.Ngons.AddPlanarNgons
